join.title: Join — Bishvileinu · Memory Builds Life
join.meta_description: Join the Bishvileinu initiative — communities, families and memorial projects, donors and partners. Find your path.
join.og_description: Join the Bishvileinu initiative — communities, families and memorial projects, donors and partners. Find your path.
join.hero_title: Let's reach out, and join in
join.hero_lead: Let's widen the circle of action — for them and for us. Find your way to join.
join.who_giving_title: 🌱 The giving side — memorial initiatives in Israel
join.who_giving_text: Initiatives founded by bereaved families in memory of the fallen — with an emphasis on active projects that strengthen Israeli society.
join.who_giving_future: Coming soon: individuals and families will also be able to join.
join.tracks_title: Which audience do you belong to?
join.track_community_text: You're a school, synagogue, federation or Jewish youth organization that wants to join the path, adopt a memorial initiative and become an active partner in building Israel — while strengthening Jewish identity and resilience in your community.
join.wa_text_community: Hello, I lead a community and I'd love to hear about joining Bishvileinu
join.track_family_text: Have you founded an initiative in memory of your loved one and want to widen the circle of remembrance? We'll introduce your initiative to Jewish communities around the world, match you with a community that will adopt and grow your dream — and accompany you every step of the way.
join.mail_subject_family: Proposing a memorial initiative to Bishvileinu
join.wa_text_family: Hello, I'm from a family that founded a memorial initiative, and we'd like to connect with communities worldwide through Bishvileinu
join.track_donor_text: Want to support expanding the initiative to more communities? Your donation subsidizes visits, funds educational materials and enables more families and more communities to meet one another. Every shekel goes directly to the path.
join.wa_text_donor: Hello, I'd like to support the Bishvileinu initiative and hear more details
join.tier_link: See the full breakdown on the "How It Works" page
join.tier_lead_rest: — BASIC, PREMIUM and PLATINUM, with an explanation of what each track includes.
join.tier_basic_text: Support through every stage of local implementation: a memorial project, family representation, and sharing the story.
join.tier_premium_text: Everything in BASIC, plus — direct involvement in the memorial project in Israel and financial partnership.
join.tier_platinum_text: Everything in PREMIUM, plus — subsidized delegations to Israel and replicating the initiative in additional places.
join.faq_q1: How long does it take to adopt a memorial initiative?
join.faq_a1: The process is flexible according to the community's needs — from an initial introductory meeting to an established partnership, usually between 3 and 12 months. We accompany you at every stage.
join.faq_q2: Is prior knowledge of remembrance topics required?
join.faq_a2: No. We provide all the educational materials, reach the community with tailored tools and accompany you throughout. The only thing required is willingness and an open heart.
join.faq_q3: Can we choose the specific initiative?
join.faq_a3: Yes. We present the community with several suitable initiatives across different fields (agriculture, education, health and more), and the community chooses the project closest to its heart.
join.faq_q4: How much does it cost to join?
join.faq_a4: The nonprofit subsidizes part of the costs to make the initiative accessible to as many communities as possible. The financial contribution depends on the chosen level of involvement. Contact us for details tailored to your community.
join.faq_q5: Can a visit to Israel be arranged?
join.faq_a5: Absolutely. A visit to Israel and to the memorial initiative is a central part of the PREMIUM and PLATINUM tiers. We coordinate and subsidize the visit and accompany the delegation throughout its stay.
join.faq_q6: What languages do you operate in?
join.faq_a6: We operate in Hebrew and English, accompanying communities around the world in keeping with the local language and culture.
join.faq_q7: We already have a connection with Israel — how is Bishvileinu different?
join.faq_a7: Bishvileinu doesn't replace existing ties but deepens them: a personal, ongoing connection to a bereaved family and a living memorial initiative, with guidance, educational materials and subsidized encounters.
join.cta_text: Every path begins with a single step. Reach out — and together we'll find the right way for you.
join.wa_text_general: Hello, I'd like to hear more about Bishvileinu
